Event:
Event Date:
Sage Bot Item Code: AR28


Other locations the gear can be found
Magic Well Explorer Chest
Book Cult Outfit

The unit's spell power is increased by 15% for the duration of the battle.

When the unit uses a weapon, armor, amulet, ring, or artifact ability, they fire an acid ball at the enemy with the lowest health. Triggers only once per 5 sec. When it hits an enemy, the acid ball deals 150000 (+bonus of the spell power) magic damage. The enemy is also covered in acid and takes 150000 (+bonus of the spell power) magic damage for 3 sec. The acid corrodes their armor, reducing it by 15% per second for a total of 3 sec. When the armor reduction reaches 45%, the effect lasts for another 1 sec. The armor wearer also restores health equal to 75% of the damage dealt by the ability.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
